upasargachandrika.example_text: 'dvAvapi nikzepO sampIqya dApanIyaH' (manu॰8.184 ityatra kullUkaH) sampIqaya=saNkalayya
'avapIqo hitaScAtra vacABAgADikAyutaH' (suSruta0 uttara0 2614) avapIqya dIyate ityavapIqo nasyaBedaH
'tasya nizpIqyamAnasya BujAntaragatasya ca' (rA0 41020) nizpIqyamAnasya balavad bADyamAnasya gAQaM saNkocamApAdyamAnasyetyarTaH
'anyAni vAsAMsi pariDAya sakfdenAnyApIqya' (ASva0 gf0 44) ihApIqayatirnizpIqayaterarTe paWitaH
'devadAnavaganDarvA rakzAMsi patagoragAH tepi BogAya kalpante daRqenEva nipIqitAH' (manu0 723).. nipIqitA bADitAH kadarTitAstAqitAH paruzamAcaritAH
'guroH sadArasya nipIqya pAdO' (raGu0 23) pAdO nipIqya caraRO gfhItvA
'sa tu bARavarotpIqAd visravatyasfg ulbaRam' (BA0 vana0 218) bARotpIqaH kzatasTAnam nayanasalilotpIqarudDAvakASAm (nidrAm) utpIqaH savega udgamaH
'aBavacCoRitodgArAtsotpIqa iva sarvataH' (rA0 41622) sotpIqaH saPenaH aBavacCoRitodgArI sApIqa iva parvata iti pAWAntaram
'utpIqa iva DUmasya mohaH prAgAvfRoti mAm' (uttara0 39) DUmasyotpIqaH saMGAtaH
'sugrIvasya SuBO mUrDnA caraRO pratyapIqayat' (rA0 56211) samaDarzat aspfSat
'viviDAni (gosahasrARi) harizyAmaH pratipIqya puraM balAt' (BA0 vi0 3010) pratipIqya bADitvA kadarTayitvA
'akAmAM kAmayAnasya SarIraM paripIqyate' (rA0 52437) sAtiSayaM pIqyate paritapyate
